use_cases: File upload via drag-and-drop interface for web applications
Upload sketch or drawing content before form submission
Capture canvas-based input with visual feedback indicators
Support document and image attachment workflows
ai_summary: A dropzone component for file uploads featuring drag-and-drop functionality with visual feedback states. Supports file attachment workflows with hover and active states, designed for applications requiring sketch or document upload capabilities. Built with accessible interactions and integrates with form submissions.
